catalog_content:
Item Name: Dr Adorable - 32 oz - Sesame Seed Oil From RAW Seed - Unrefined 100% Pure Natural Organic Cold Pressed Bullet Point 1: 100% Pure and Natural Premium Organic Unrefined Sesame Seed Oil from Raw Seed Bullet Point 2: Botanical Name: Sesamum indicum Bullet Point 3: Method: Cold Pressed Bullet Point 4: Skin Hydration, Hair Vitality, Anti-Aging Elixir, Ethical and Sustainable Bullet Point 5: Country: India Product Description: Unveil the natural secret to glowing skin and lustrous hair with our premium-grade Unrefined Sesame Oil from Raw Seed. Known for centuries for its remarkable nourishing properties, this cold-pressed oil is a treasure trove of nutrients and antioxidants.

Skin Hydration: Deeply moisturize and rejuvenate your skin with the hydrating properties of Sesame Oil. Its rich texture absorbs quickly, leaving your skin supple and soft.
Anti-Aging Elixir: Packed with antioxidants such as Vitamin E and sesamol, this oil helps in reducing the signs of aging for a youthful complexion.
Hair Vitality: Revitalize dull, lackluster hair by massaging Sesame Oil into your scalp. Nourishing hair follicles, it strengthens strands, promotes shine, and tames frizz.
Sustainably Sourced: Our Sesame Oil is ethically sourced and cruelty-free, ensuring a pure and natural product free from harmful additives.

How to Use:
For skin: Apply a few drops onto cleansed skin, gently massaging until fully absorbed. Use as a standalone moisturizer or blend with your favorite skincare products.
For hair: Warm the oil and massage it into the scalp. Leave on as desired before washing for a deep conditioning treatment.

Elevate your beauty routine with this versatile and nourishing oil, providing you with the ultimate in skincare and hair care benefits. Value: 32.0 Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Premium organic sesame oil positioned as a high-end beauty and personal care product. Cold-pressed, unrefined, and cruelty-free, it targets skin hydration and hair vitality. The 32 fl oz plastic bottle suggests a mid-to-large size, suitable for regular use. The organic and natural claims, along with the anti-aging and ethical sourcing benefits, justify a premium price point compared to standard cooking oils.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Green Valley Organics Black Beans | Certified Organic | Deliciously Tender, Creamy & Mild | Deep Dark Skin | Good Source of Dietary Fiber & Protein | 15.5 oz can (Pack of 4) Bullet Point 1: DELICIOUS TASTE & ORGANIC: Green Valley Black Beans are harvested when the bean pods become a tan, "buckskin" color and the beans held within have dried to the right moisture level and changed from purple to a deep black-purple color. Green Valley is extra picky in selecting just the right Organic Black beans that we then prepare to deliver tender black beans that have a deliciously mild, creamy flavor, and rich dark black-purple color. Organic food at its very best! Bullet Point 2: NATURAL GOODNESS: Green Valley Organic Black Beans are grown using organic farming techniques. This is done by building up the soil with natural inputs, managing weeds and pests through cultivation, and crop rotation techniques. Green Valley Organics' goal is to make every pea-sized deep black-purple bean deliciously mild and creamy tasting ready for your enjoyment. Bullet Point 3: CLEAN LABEL: Just prepared organic black beans, water and sea salt! Yep, that is it! A cholesterol free food and good source of dietary fiber and protein! Each serving of Green Valley organic black beans contains 8 grams of plant-based protein. Certified Kosher. Bullet Point 4: GROWN & MADE IN THE USA: Green Valley Organic Black Beans are Grown & Made in the USA. Cultivated by U.S. farmers on family-owned farms located in the fertile growing regions of the mid-west or western United States. Bullet Point 5: ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY: Green Valley Organic Black Beans are packaged in recyclable steel cans made with Non-BPA lining (can lining not intentionally made with BPA). Green Valley Organic Black Beans are Ready-to-Enjoy as a side-dish or in your favorite recipes like, Black Bean Salad with Corn & Avocado or Black Bean Chili! Visit welcometogreenvalleyDOTcom/recipe/ for recipes and more! Product Description: It is no wonder that Black Beans seem to grow in popularity every year - after all they are native to the Americas! Perfect for Black Bean Chili, Black Bean Burritos and Frijoles Negros! Deliciously Organic, Green Valley Black Beans are harvested when the bean pods have dried to a light tan color and the beans within have just the right moisture and are a deep black-purple color. Green Valley is extra picky in selecting just the right Organic Black beans that when prepared deliver tender black beans that have a deliciously mild, creamy flavor, and rich dark black-purple color. Green Valley - Organic food at its very best!

Green Valley products are grown using modern organic farming techniques on family-owned farms in the U.S. Organic farming techniques allows us to create the finest organic black beans for you and your family. Each can contains just prepared organic black beans, water and sea salt!

Green Valley Organic Black Beans are a good source of dietary fiber and plant-based protein. Each serving contains 8 grams of protein - that’s 28 grams per can!

So whether you are making Black Bean Salad with Corn & Avocados or Black Bean Chili - Green Valley Organic Black Beans are perfect. Try all of Green Valley's finest organic vegetables and beans including: Garbanzo Beans, Pinto Beans, Dark Red Kidney Beans, Supersweet Whole Kernel Corn, Cut Green Beans, Peas, and French-Style Green Beans. Value: 62.0 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium organic product with clear health claims and high protein content. Multi-pack deal suggests value pricing, while organic certification and U.S. sourcing indicate higher quality positioning. Recyclable metal packaging and clean label appeal to health-conscious consumers.
